assertionResults.fullName: Redis Rate Limiting Middleware should pass through when request is under the limit (First request)
assertionResults.title: should pass through when request is under the limit (First request)

assertionResults.fullName: Redis Rate Limiting Middleware should pass through when request is exactly at the limit
assertionResults.title: should pass through when request is exactly at the limit

assertionResults.fullName: Redis Rate Limiting Middleware should return 429 when request exceeds the limit
assertionResults.title: should return 429 when request exceeds the limit

assertionResults.fullName: Redis Rate Limiting Middleware should fail open (pass through) when Redis goes offline
assertionResults.title: should fail open (pass through) when Redis goes offline

assertionResults.fullName: Redis Rate Limiting Middleware should strictly limit /api/auth using its lower configured points value
assertionResults.title: should strictly limit /api/auth using its lower configured points value

assertionResults.fullName: Redis Rate Limiting Middleware should use user-keyed rate limiting for authenticated routes (/api/products)
assertionResults.title: should use user-keyed rate limiting for authenticated routes (/api/products)

assertionResults.fullName: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) should return 401 if no token is provided on admin route
assertionResults.title: should return 401 if no token is provided on admin route

assertionResults.fullName: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) should return 403 if valid token does not have admin role
assertionResults.title: should return 403 if valid token does not have admin role

assertionResults.fullName: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) should proxy through and return 200 if valid token has admin role
assertionResults.title: should proxy through and return 200 if valid token has admin role

assertionResults.fullName: JWT Authentication Middleware should return 401 if no token is provided
assertionResults.title: should return 401 if no token is provided

assertionResults.fullName: JWT Authentication Middleware should return 401 if token is malformed
assertionResults.title: should return 401 if token is malformed

assertionResults.fullName: JWT Authentication Middleware should return 401/403 if token is signed with wrong secret
assertionResults.title: should return 401/403 if token is signed with wrong secret

assertionResults.fullName: JWT Authentication Middleware should return 401/403 if token is expired
assertionResults.title: should return 401/403 if token is expired

assertionResults.fullName: JWT Authentication Middleware should proxy through and return 200 with valid token
assertionResults.title: should proxy through and return 200 with valid token

assertionResults.fullName: Global Error Handler Middleware should return 404 with JSON/HTML body for unknown routes
assertionResults.title: should return 404 with JSON/HTML body for unknown routes

assertionResults.fullName: Global Error Handler Middleware should return JSON body with error structure for runtime/parsing errors
assertionResults.title: should return JSON body with error structure for runtime/parsing errors

assertionResults.fullName: Global Error Handler Middleware should return 413 for oversized JSON payloads
assertionResults.title: should return 413 for oversized JSON payloads

assertionResults.fullName: Graceful Shutdown should call server.close and redisClient.quit on shutdown
assertionResults.title: should call server.close and redisClient.quit on shutdown
